elements.title: lang::report_page_040_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_ue.id,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_ue.timecreated                      as enrolled,
       kbi_ue.userid,
       kbi_e.enrol                             AS enrols,
       kbi_ul.timeaccess                       AS lastaccess,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade,
       kbi_c.id                                as cid,
       kbi_c.shortname,
       kbi_ca.name                             AS category,
       kbi_c.fullname                          as course
FROM mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_enrol kbi_e ON kbi_e.id = kbi_ue.enrolid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_ca ON kbi_ca.id = kbi_c.category
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ul ON kbi_ul.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ul.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course' AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_e.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT MAX(kbi_t.id) AS id, kbi_t.userid, kbi_t.courseid
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_t, mdl_local_kopere_bi_track_log kbi_l
                  WHERE kbi_l.trackid = kbi_t.id
                  GROUP BY kbi_t.courseid, kbi_t.userid) as l ON kbi_l.courseid = kbi_e.courseid AND kbi_l.userid = kbi_ue.userid
WHERE kbi_l.id IS NULL
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ue.status = 0
  AND kbi_e.status = 0
